details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. All other expected top-level directories (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) and reports/audit/ are present.

reports/board/ missing. memory_bank/ has key docs (report_output_contract.md, report_retention_policy.md, systemPatterns.md, TELEMETRY_CHANGELOG.md). .cursor/automations/ exists with README.md and spec files. reports/audit/ exists.
Deprecated directory moltbot/ still exists at repository root with active code files: board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, memory_evolution.py, __init__.py, agents/.

Moltbot/Clawdbot references found in code/config (excluding reports/audit and docs documenting removal): moltbot/ directory with active Python modules; scripts/run_molt_workflow.py imports from moltbot; scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py references Moltbot.
